nasb.text: Your heart was lifted up because of your beauty; You corrupted your wisdom by reason of your splendor. I cast you to the ground; I put you before kings, That they may see you.

esv.text: Your heart was proud because of your beauty; you corrupted your wisdom for the sake of your splendor. I cast you to the ground; I exposed you before kings, to feast their eyes on you.

cnv.text: 你因自己的美麗心裡高傲， 又因你的光彩敗壞了你的智慧。 所以我把你拋在地上； 放在列王面前， 好讓他們觀看。

ccb.text: 你因俊美而心高气傲， 因辉煌而心智败坏， 所以我把你扔到地上， 让你在列国的君王面前出丑。
